assessment.en: Slash is a right-spin Attack Type Assist Blade. Official stats: Attack 20 / Defense 10 / Stamina 10. Weight: 4.7g. Height: 50mm. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: The Turn-A Assist Blade in Attack mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with a reversible outer piece; in this mode the contact points have additional protrusions for rapid barrage attacks.
description.de: The Turn-A Assist Blade in Attack mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with a reversible outer piece; in this mode the contact points have additional protrusions for rapid barrage attacks.

assessment.en: Turn-A places the Turn Assist Blade in Attack mode. The exposed protrusions create barrage-attack potential, but the shape still keeps some defensive utility. Weight: 5.8g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.
assessment.de: Turn-A places the Turn Assist Blade in Angriff mode. The exposed protrusions create barrage-attack potential, but the shape still keeps some defensive utility. Gewicht: 5.8g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.

description.en: The Turn-D Assist Blade in Defense mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with a reversible outer piece; in this mode the contact points are smoother to deflect opposing attacks.
description.de: The Turn-D Assist Blade in Defense mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with a reversible outer piece; in this mode the contact points are smoother to deflect opposing attacks.

assessment.en: Turn-D places the Turn Assist Blade in Defense mode. The smoother contact points improve deflection and stability at the cost of aggression. Weight: 5.8g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.
assessment.de: Turn-D places the Turn Assist Blade in Verteidigung mode. The smoother contact points improve deflection and stability at the cost of aggression. Gewicht: 5.8g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.

description.en: The Dual-U Assist Blade in Upper mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with reversible contact points slanting upward to create Upper Attack potential.
description.de: The Dual-U Assist Blade in Upper mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with reversible contact points slanting upward to create Upper Attack potential.

assessment.en: Dual-U sets Dual to Upper mode. The upward-sloping points can lift opponents and destabilize them, though the effect is subtle. Weight: 5.9g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.
assessment.de: Dual-U sets Dual to Upper mode. The upward-sloping points can lift opponents and destabilize them, though the effect is subtle. Gewicht: 5.9g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.

description.en: The Dual-S Assist Blade in Smash mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with reversible contact points slanting downward to create Smash Attack potential.
description.de: The Dual-S Assist Blade in Smash mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with reversible contact points slanting downward to create Smash Attack potential.

assessment.en: Dual-S sets Dual to Smash mode. The downward-sloping points focus on hard, direct strikes but increase recoil slightly. Weight: 5.9g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.
assessment.de: Dual-S sets Dual to Smash mode. The downward-sloping points focus on hard, direct strikes but increase recoil slightly. Gewicht: 5.9g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.

description.en: A right-spin Attack Type Assist Blade from the Custom Line with reversible contact points. It can switch between Upper mode for lifting opponents and Smash mode for direct strikes.
description.de: Ein rechtsdrehender Attack-Typ-Assist-Blade aus der Custom Line mit umkehrbaren Kontaktpunkten. Er kann zwischen Upper-Modus zum Anheben des Gegners und Smash-Modus für direkte Treffer wechseln.

assessment.en: Dual is a versatile Attack-oriented Assist Blade with a mode-change gimmick. Official stats: Attack 45 / Defense 35 / Stamina 20 / Height 60. Weight: 5.9g. Ratings based on community data.
assessment.de: Dual ist ein versatile Attack-oriented Assist Blade with a mode-change gimmick. Offizielle Werte: Angriff 45 / Verteidigung 35 / Ausdauer 20 / Höhe 60. Gewicht: 5.9g. Ratings based on community data.

description.en: A right-spin Stamina Type Assist Blade from the Custom Line. It debuted with BrachioWhip OW5-70Nr in the CX-18 Random Booster and features an outer-heavy weight distribution for longer spin times.
description.de: Ein rechtsdrehender Stamina-Typ-Assist-Blade aus der Custom Line. Er debütierte mit BrachioWhip OW5-70Nr im CX-18 Random Booster und verfügt über eine außenlastige Gewichtsverteilung für längere Drehzeiten.

assessment.en: Outer is a Stamina-focused Assist Blade that uses outer weight distribution to improve spin endurance and stability. Detailed competitive data is still limited due to its recent release. Weight estimated: 5.5g. Ratings estimated from type, weight and shape.
assessment.de: Outer ist ein Stamina-focused Assist Blade that uses outer weight distribution to improve spin endurance and stability. Detailed competitive data is still limited due to its recent release. Gewicht estimated: 5.5g. Ratings estimated from type, weight and shape.
